foodsDescription: From comfort classics to international delicacies. Each round one player is bluffing — can you sniff out who doesn't really know the dish?
animalsDescription: From domestic pets to wild predators. Describe your creature without giving too much away — the impostor is hiding in the herd!
halloweenDescription: Ghosts, vampires, witches and monsters lurk here. Answer spooky questions and bluff your way through — the impostor walks among you in the shadows!
moviesDescription: Blockbusters, cult classics and binge-worthy series. Describe without spoiling — one player has never seen it and is bluffing their way through!
sportsDescription: From Olympic gold to backyard games. Talk tactics, rules, and glory — but one player in the group has never played a day in their life!
musicDescription: Icons, legends, and chart-toppers across every era. Talk about the sound, the vibe, the legacy — but one player is faking it!
geographyDescription: Capitals, cultures, cuisines and landscapes from around the world. Describe your country without giving it away — the impostor is lost on the map!
professionsDescription: From surgeons to sailors, teachers to taxi drivers. Talk about the job without naming it — one player has no idea what the role actually involves!

partyModeDescription: More impostors, more confusion. Best for big groups.
classicModeDescription: One impostor, two sets of questions.
mimicModeDescription: No words. Show what you know.
